_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Regulation (EU) 2024/1610, adopted on 14 May 2024 and published in the Official Journal on 6 June 2024, amends Regulation (EU) 2019/1242 to strengthen CO₂ emission performance standards for new heavy-duty vehicles and to integrate monitoring and reporting obligations previously contained in the now-repealed Regulation (EU) 2018/956.
prior.source_span: Regulation (EU) 2018/956 should be repealed with transitional provisions allowing the reporting period that is ongoing at the moment of entry into force of this Regulation to be concluded under the rules applicable at the beginning of that reporting period, including all processing of the data collected.
